Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Main article: 2026 in video games

The following is a comprehensive index of all games released in 2026, sorted chronologically by release date, and divided by quarter. Information regarding developer, publisher, operating system, genre, and type of release is provided where available

For a summary of 2026 in video games as a whole, see 2026 in video games.

Legend

[edit]
Video game platforms
DROIDAndroidGENSega Genesis / Mega DriveiOSiOS, iPhone, iPod, iPadOS, iPad,
visionOS, Apple Vision Pro
LINLinuxNSNintendo SwitchNS2Nintendo Switch 2
OSXmacOSPS4PlayStation 4PS5PlayStation 5
WINMicrosoft Windows, all
versions Windows 95 and up		XBOXbox OneXBX/SXbox Series X/S
Types of releases
CompilationA compilation, anthology or collection of several titles, usually (but not always) belonging to the same series
Early accessA game launched in early access is unfinished and thus might contain bugs and glitches or have some of the content missing
EpisodicAn episodic video game that is released in batches over a period of time
ExpansionA large-scale DLC to an already existing game that adds new story, areas and additions and/or changes to the game's mechanics
Full releaseA full release of a game that launched in early access first
PortThe game first appeared on a different platform and a port was made. The game is like the original, with few or no differences
RemakeThe game is an enhanced remake of an original, made using new engine and/or assets and thus containing completely new sound, graphics and possibly changes to the story and/or gameplay
RemasterThe game is a remaster of an original, released on the same or different platform, with minor changes to graphics, sound and/or gameplay
RereleaseThe game was re-released on the same platform with no or only minor changes
Video game genres
ActionAction gameAction RPGAction role-playing gameAction-adventureAction-adventure game
AdventureAdventure gameBattle royaleBattle royale gameBrawlerBeat 'em up
Bullet heavenVampire Survivors–likeBullet hellBullet hellBusiness simBusiness simulation game
City builderCity-building gameCMSConstruction and management simulationDeck buildingDeck building game
Digital tabletopDigital tabletop gameDungeon crawlDungeon crawlFarmingFarm life sim
FightingFighting gameFPSFirst-person shooterGod gameGod game
Government simGovernment simulation gameHack and slashHack and slashHero shooterHero shooter
HorrorHorror gameInteractive filmInteractive filmLife simLife simulation game
MetroidvaniaMetroidvaniaMMOMassively multiplayer online gameMOBAMultiplayer online battle arena
Monster tamerMonster-taming gameNarrative adventureNarrative adventure gamePartyParty video game
PCAPoint-and-click adventurePlatformerPlatformerPuzzlePuzzle video game
Puzzle-platformerPuzzle-platformerRacingRacing gameRhythmRhythm game
RoguelikeRoguelike, RogueliteRPGRole-playing video gameRTSReal-time strategy
RTTReal-time tacticsRun and gunRun and gun gameSandboxSandbox game
Scrolling shooterScrolling shooterShoot 'em upShoot 'em upSimulationSimulation video game
Social simSocial simulation gameSoulslikeSoulslikeSportsSports video game
StealthStealth gameStrategyStrategy video gameSurvivalSurvival game
Survival horrorSurvival horrorTactical RPGTactical role-playing gameTBSTurn-based strategy
TBTTurn-based tacticsTile matchingTile-matching video gameTPSThird-person shooter
Vehicle simVehicle simulation gameVehicular combatVehicular combat gameVisual novelVisual novel

List

[edit]
This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by editing the page to add missing items, with references to reliable sources.

Wildekin Unknown WIN, XBO, XBX/S Adventure Cute Newt Chucklefish [712]
Windblown Unknown WIN Full release Action, Roguelike Motion Twin [713]
Witchbrook Unknown WIN, NS, NS2, XBO, XBX/S Life sim, RPG Chucklefish [714]
Witchfire Unknown WIN Full release FPS The Astronauts [‡ 33][715]
Wolfhound Unknown WIN, OSX, LIN, NS, PS5 Metroidvania Bit Kid [716]
Xelan Force AE (JP) Unknown WIN, NS, PS5 Scrolling shooter (horizontal) PiXEL [717]
Zaleste (JP) Unknown NS, PS4, PS5 Shoot 'em up M2 Compile Heart [718]
Zero Racers Unknown NS, NS2 Port Racing Nintendo [91]

Notes

[edit]
  1. ^ a b Includes El Viento, Earnest Evans, and Anett Futatabi.
  2. ^ Includes Lady Phantom, Travel Epule, Dekoboko Densetsu, Pop'n Magic, Naritore, and High Grenadier.
  3. ^ Released as Kyouran Makaism in Japan.
  4. ^ Includes Dokapon 3-2-1: Arashi wo Yobu Yuujou, Kessen! Dokapon Oudoku IV: Densetsu no Yusha Tachi, and Dokapon Gaiden: Honoo no Audition.
  5. ^ Includes X-Men: The Arcade Game, Captain America and The Avengers, Spider-Man and Venom: Maximum Carnage, Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety, Spider-Man/X-Men: Arcade's Revenge, and Silver Surfer.
  6. ^ Includes remastered versions of Blue Reflection and Blue Reflection: Second Light, a new game adaptation of the Blue Reflection Ray anime, and a console remake of the mobile game Blue Reflection Sun.
  7. ^ Consists of an original release, 2 remasters and a remake
  8. ^ The calendar year is divided into four quarters, often abbreviated Q1 (January to March), Q2 (April to June), Q3 (July to September) and Q4 (October to December).

  638. ^ "Rockbeasts - Official Gameplay Trailer". IGN. July 18, 2025. Retrieved August 5, 2025. Rockbeasts is launching in 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

  658. ^ Romano, Sal (October 21, 2025). "The Sinking City 2 launches in first half of 2026". Gematsu. Retrieved October 22, 2025.
  659. ^ Lada, Jenni (November 10, 2025). "Sins of Kaleido Is Part of the Even if Tempest Otome Game Series". Siliconera. Retrieved November 17, 2025. It will debut worldwide in both English and Japanese in 2026.
  660. ^ Romano, Sal (August 26, 2025). "skate. launches in Early Access on September 16 for PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, and PC". Gematsu. Archived from the original on August 30, 2025. Retrieved August 26, 2025. The studio hopes to move toward a full release approximately one year from the start of Early Access.
  661. ^ Romano, Sal (October 29, 2025). "Slam City with Scottie Pippen: Respect Edition announced for PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, and Switch". Gematsu. Retrieved October 29, 2025. It will launch in 2026.
  662. ^ Romano, Sal (October 23, 2025). "Solasta II launches in Early Access in early 2026". Gematsu. Retrieved October 24, 2025.
  663. ^ Van Allen, Eric (June 12, 2025). "Spine is a gun-fu love letter that wants to make you feel as OP as John Wick". PC Gamer. Retrieved November 18, 2025. Spine is aiming for an undetermined 2026 release date.
  664. ^ Kerr, Chris (January 16, 2026). "Spry Fox co-founder on the realities of independence after split from Netflix". Game Developer. Retrieved February 4, 2026. The studio's upcoming title, Spirit Crossing, remains in development after the move and will still be published by Netflix. [...] The studio is targeting a public beta in spring 2026 (April - June) before a full launch later in the year.
  665. ^ Romano, Sal (December 9, 2025). "Spirit Crossing adds PC version". Gematsu. Retrieved December 10, 2025.
  666. ^ Romano, Sal (December 4, 2025). "Fullbright announces narrative exploration game Springs, Eternal for PC". Gematsu. Retrieved December 5, 2025. Due out in 2026.
  667. ^ Yin-Poole, Wesley (October 19, 2024). "Star Citizen Dev 'Confident' of Releasing Standalone Single-Player Story Game Squadron 42 in 2026". IGN. Archived from the original on May 9, 2025. Retrieved April 7, 2025.
  668. ^ Romano, Sal (February 26, 2026). "RedOctane Games announces rhythm action game Stage Tour for consoles, PC". Gematsu. Retrieved February 26, 2026.

  673. ^ Romano, Sal (August 4, 2025). "Stick It to the Stickman launches in Early Access on August 18". Gematsu. Retrieved August 4, 2025.
  674. ^ Romano, Sal (November 29, 2025). "Haishin Shoujo no Uraaka Meikyuu debut trailer". Gematsu. Retrieved November 29, 2025. Visual novel RPG due out in 2026.

  676. ^ Romano, Sal (November 26, 2025). "Psychological adventure game reimagining Sublustrum announced for consoles, PC". Gematsu. Retrieved November 26, 2025.
  677. ^ Bardhan, Ashley (November 26, 2025). "Former Stardew Valley dev has to delay adorable new life sim for the second time, shortly after adding the most perfect piles of snow: "I've been working very hard on the game"". GamesRadar+. Retrieved December 10, 2025.
  678. ^ Romano, Sal (February 27, 2026). "Super Meat Boy 3D adds Switch 2 version". Gematsu. Retrieved February 27, 2026. Alongside its previously announced PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, Microsoft Store) versions in 2026.
  679. ^ Litchfield, Ted (July 13, 2024). "It's rare for a pixel art throwback to really wow me these days, but a hybrid action-JRPG where you collect magical octopus friends to cast spells might just fit the bill". PC Gamer. Archived from the original on July 13, 2024. Retrieved July 26, 2024.
  680. ^ Romano, Sal (May 6, 2025). "Tales of Seikyu launches in Early Access on May 21". Gematsu. Archived from the original on May 6, 2025. Retrieved May 7, 2025. The Early Access period is expected to last around one year.
  681. ^ Romano, Sal (December 24, 2025). "TANUKI: Pon's Summer delayed to 2026". Gematsu. Retrieved December 25, 2025.
  682. ^ Romano, Sal (April 23, 2026). "Tears of Metal adds Xbox Series version". Gematsu. Retrieved April 23, 2026. Due out in Early Access this spring.
  683. ^ Hou, Rita (March 3, 2025). "Demo Of This Retro 2D Survival Horror With Live-Action Cutscenes Updated". 80 Level. Retrieved April 26, 2025.
  684. ^ Romano, Sal (April 30, 2025). "Any and ArtePiazza announce Tensei Game for Switch – sugoroku-style game with Yuji Horii, Muneyuki Kaneshiro". Gematsu. Archived from the original on April 30, 2025. Retrieved May 1, 2025.
  685. ^ Tolbert, Samuel (June 9, 2025). "There Are No Ghosts at the Grand announced at Xbox Games Showcase 2025, a cozy musical adventure with eldritch horror comes to Game Pass". Windows Central. Retrieved August 10, 2025.
  686. ^ Romano, Sal (August 1, 2025). "Titan Quest II for PC now available in Early Access". Gematsu. Retrieved August 2, 2025. A full release will follow for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC in 2026.
  687. ^ Romano, Sal (March 3, 2026). "TOEM 2 launches this summer for PS5, Switch, and PC". Gematsu. Retrieved March 3, 2026.
  688. ^ Romano, Sal (December 11, 2025). "Tomb Raider remake Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC". Gematsu. Retrieved December 12, 2025.
  689. ^ Romano, Sal (December 11, 2025). "Town of Zoz launches in early 2026". Gematsu. Retrieved December 13, 2025.
  690. ^ Romano, Sal (May 21, 2025). "Transport Fever 3 announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC". Gematsu. Retrieved May 21, 2025.
  691. ^ Romano, Sal (October 31, 2025). "Co-op action RPG Triarchy announced for PC". Gematsu. Retrieved November 1, 2025.
  692. ^ Romano, Sal (July 3, 2025). "Tristia: Chronicles announced for Switch". Gematsu. Archived from the original on July 8, 2025. Retrieved July 4, 2025.

  695. ^ Romano, Sal (February 5, 2026). "Turok: Origins adds Switch 2 version, launches this fall". Gematsu. Retrieved February 5, 2026.
  696. ^ Romano, Sal (September 23, 2025). "UNDEFEATED: Genesis 'Story' trailer". Gematsu. Retrieved September 24, 2025. Due out for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam in 2026.

  698. ^ Romano, Sal (May 25, 2025). "Co-op first-person roguelite adventure game UnderMire announced for PC". Gematsu. Retrieved May 26, 2025.
  699. ^ Romano, Sal (February 5, 2026). "Valheim coming to Switch 2 in 2026". Gematsu. Retrieved February 5, 2026. Due out alongside previously announced PlayStation 5 release.

  703. ^ Romano, Sal (November 22, 2025). "Co-op dark fantasy looter shooter Vision Quench announced for PC". Gematsu. Retrieved November 24, 2025. Due out in 2026.
  704. ^ Romano, Sal (November 27, 2025). "Shueisha Games announces 'casual non-verbal social deduction action game' VIVA NOBOTS for PC". Gematsu. Retrieved November 28, 2025. Due out in spring 2026.

  708. ^ Romano, Sal (April 9, 2026). "Warhammer Survivors adds PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch versions". Gematsu. Retrieved April 20, 2026. Due out in 2026.
  709. ^ Romano, Sal (February 26, 2026). "We Were Here Tomorrow announced for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC". Gematsu. Retrieved February 26, 2026.
  710. ^ Romano, Sal (April 21, 2026). "Well Dweller demo launches April 23". Gematsu. Retrieved April 21, 2026. Well Dweller is due out for Switch and PC via Steam in 2026.

Primary sources

In the text, these references are preceded by a double dagger (‡):

  1. ^ "your ingenuity is the key to clearing every stage! "Öoo" officially launches today on The Xbox Series X|S and Xbox Play Anywhere versions, brought to you by AMATA Games!". AMATA Games. March 19, 2026. Retrieved March 30, 2026. ... as of today, March 18,The Xbox Series X|S versions officially out.
  2. ^ "Unrailed 2: Back on Track - 1.0 Release Window Update". Steam. April 8, 2026. Retrieved May 4, 2026. Unrailed 2: Back on Track will now release in June on Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5 and Steam
  3. ^ "Aloft". Steam. Archived from the original on June 23, 2025. Retrieved June 30, 2025. Aloft will remain in Early Access for at least a year.
  4. ^ Filet Group; XSEED Games (December 11, 2025). "The Big Catch - An Update on Release Timing". Steam. Retrieved December 25, 2025. We're doing all that we can to make sure The Big Catch is in your hands in 2026.
  5. ^ "The Binding of Isaac: Repentance+". Nicalis. Retrieved March 27, 2026. Release Date: Q3 2026
  6. ^ "Notice on Future Updates to "Boyhood's End"". Steam. November 14, 2025. Retrieved November 27, 2025. We will be temporarily halting our serialized updates.
  7. ^ The Farm 51 (December 18, 2025). "Chernobylite 2: Exclusion Zone - Megapatch 06 - (Not Yet) Butter Smooth". Steam. Retrieved December 25, 2025. Full & final Chernobylite 2: Exclusion Zone release for PC is going to happen in 2026! When exactly? We can't confirm it officially yet but most likely in Q1/Q2!{{cite web}}: CS1 maint: numeric names: authors list (link)
  8. ^ Kraak, Nicholas (November 13, 2025). "Cook, Serve, Delicious: Re-Mustard! - Dev Update #04: Writing Recipes". Steam. Retrieved January 30, 2026. Cook, Serve, Delicious: Re-Mustard will be released early 2026!
  9. ^ "Coromon Rogue Planet: September Progress Update". Steam. September 7, 2025. Retrieved November 11, 2025. Our new release date is planned for 2026.
  10. ^ Fox, Toby (September 15, 2025). "UNDERTALE DELTARUNE NEWSLETTER FALL 2025". Fangamer. Retrieved November 22, 2025. Factoring the localization and testing... I don't think that the game will be released in the first half of 2026.
  11. ^ Rightstickdev (November 5, 2025). "Hey everyone, Nick here with a general DoubleShake update". Retrieved November 28, 2025 – via Tumblr. We've delayed the release window to 2026 [...] hoping for a Q2 release window.
  12. ^ "Glaciered". Steam. Retrieved March 27, 2026. Planned Release Date: Q2 2026
  13. ^ "GOALS". Steam. Archived from the original on July 5, 2025. Retrieved July 5, 2025. Planned Release Date: 2026
  14. ^ "Into the Fire". Steam. Archived from the original on April 10, 2025. Retrieved April 11, 2025. At the moment we are aiming for 2026 for the release of the full version.
  15. ^ "Kitsune: The Journey of Adashino". Steam. Retrieved December 25, 2025. Planned Release Date: Q4 2026
  16. ^ "MEDIEVAL – Press Kit". medievalgame.com. Cypronia. Retrieved March 26, 2026.
  17. ^ Pathea Games (January 20, 2026). "Evershine 2026 New Year Plans". Steam. Retrieved February 2, 2026. Our goal is to launch within 2026, and we're aiming to release on PC and consoles at the same time.
  18. ^ "Neon Abyss 2". Steam. Archived from the original on December 12, 2024. Retrieved December 12, 2024. We expect Neon Abyss 2's Early Access development to continue into 2026.
  19. ^ ION LANDS Team (October 23, 2025). "Nivalis Development Update". Steam. Retrieved November 25, 2025. We've made the decision to officially move Nivalis' release a few months ahead into 2026.
  20. ^ Sunnyside Games (March 12, 2026). "Nocturnal 2 - What's next & Release date". Steam. Retrieved March 27, 2026. We will move the release window from Q1 to Q2.
  21. ^ "Pastry Panic!". Nicalis. Retrieved March 27, 2026. Release Date: Q3 2026
  22. ^ "Petal Crash 2". Steam. Archived from the original on January 30, 2025. Retrieved January 30, 2025. We anticipate that the game may be ready some time in mid to late 2026.
  23. ^ 314 Arts (August 20, 2025). "An Update on Projekt Z's Release". Steam. Retrieved November 18, 2025. We're shifting our launch to 2026.{{cite web}}: CS1 maint: numeric names: authors list (link)
  24. ^ Semiwork (December 19, 2025). "R.E.P.O. - BIG NEW THINGS coming to R.E.P.O." Steam. Retrieved February 4, 2026. We're also stepping into a new year, 2026 – which is the year we are planning to fully release R.E.P.O. with a 1.0 version!
  25. ^ "RuneScape: Dragonwilds". Steam. Archived from the original on March 31, 2025. Retrieved March 31, 2025. Our current estimation is that the game will be ready to leave Early Access in early 2026.
  26. ^ tobspr (August 28, 2025). "Devlog 034 - 1.0 Status Update & Gamescom Recap". Steam. Retrieved December 10, 2025. Whilst we can't give a definitive date yet, we're now aiming for somewhere around early April 2026.
  27. ^ "Stick It to the Stickman". Steam. August 4, 2025. Archived from the original on August 4, 2025. Retrieved August 4, 2025. We plan on keeping Stick it to the Stickman in Early Access into 2026, we don't have a specific end date, but our target is approximately 12 months.
  28. ^ New Blood Interactive (November 7, 2025). "Tenebris Somnia - Trailer 3". Steam. Retrieved November 24, 2025. Arrives in 2026.
  29. ^ "Touhou Hero of Ice Fairy - Summer Update Now Available!". Steam. June 26, 2025. Retrieved August 4, 2025. Touhou Hero of Ice Fairy will be released on Nintendo Switch in 2026!
  30. ^ "UNDERGROUNDED". Steam. Retrieved November 24, 2025. Planned Release Date: 2026
  31. ^ "VICE Undercover". Steam. Retrieved December 8, 2025. Planned Release Date: Q2 2026
  32. ^ Radical Theory (December 15, 2025). "WESTLANDERS unveiled in first Gameplay Trailer, from The Breach Studios, powered by Radical Theory". Radical Theory. Archived from the original on January 23, 2026. Retrieved January 23, 2026.
  33. ^ Modzelewski, Piotrek (September 10, 2025). "The Road(map) to Final Release". The Astronauts. Retrieved March 27, 2026.
